---
title: ""
date: ""
---

```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(scholar)
library(tidyverse)

# Retrieve  publication entries from Google Scholar and sort chronologically.
id <- 'v3VYtRkAAAAJ&hl'
pubs <- scholar::get_publications(id)
pubs <- pubs[rev(order(pubs$year)), ]
urls<-scholar::get_article_scholar_url(str_remove(id,"&hl$"), pubs$pubid)
pubs$urls <- urls

pubs|>write_csv("pubs.csv")

abst<-pubs|>filter(str_detect(journal,"Drug and Alcohol"))
pubs<-pubs|>filter(!str_detect(journal,"Drug and Alcohol"))

# Format entries as a markdown unordered list.
pubs_lst <- data.frame(
  ref = paste0(
    '[', pubs$title, '](', pubs$urls, ').',
    '<br/>', pubs$author, '.',
    '<br/>', pubs$journal, ', ', pubs$year, '.'
  )
)
abst_lst <- data.frame(
  ref = paste0(
    '[', abst$title, '](', abst$urls, ').',
    '<br/>', abst$author, '.',
    '<br/>', abst$journal, ', ', abst$year, '.'
  )
)

pubs_lst$ref <- stringr::str_replace_all(pubs_lst$ref, 'A(lec)?\\s*Bodolay', '**\\0**')
abst_lst$ref <- stringr::str_replace_all(abst_lst$ref, 'A(lec)?\\s*Bodolay', '**\\0**')
```

### Journal

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[1\]
:::
::: {.column width="95%"}
`r pubs_lst$ref[2]`
:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[2\]
:::
::: {.column width="95%"}
`r pubs_lst$ref[1]`
:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[3\]
:::
::: {.column width="95%"}
`r pubs_lst$ref[3]`
:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[4\]
:::
::: {.column width="95%"}
`r pubs_lst$ref[4]`
:::
:::

### Abstracts

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[1\]
:::
::: {.column width="95%"}
`r abst_lst$ref[3]`
:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[2\]
:::
::: {.column width="95%"}
`r abst_lst$ref[1]`
:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[3\]
:::
::: {.column width="95%"}
`r abst_lst$ref[4]`
:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="5%"}
\[4\]
:::
::: {.column width="95%"}
`r abst_lst$ref[5]`
:::
:::
